column1: In Q3 Tab "Q3.house sensitivity study & E2", calculate the total cumulative energy used for heating as well as the total cumulative energy including construction (in cells B22 to C23)

Then graphically represent on the empty figure Q3.1 in the excel file (Cells G14 to P36) the evolution of the cumulative non renewable primary energy required per ft2 for each of these two scenarios as a function of the time elapsed since initial construction from 0 to 50 years (use brown line for standard house 1, green line for well insulated house 2). Be accurate in drawing your lines
